subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of my heart and Thou Who art remembered in my soul! This year, too, the signs of grief have encompassed all, and the banners of sorrow have been raised aloft [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی و المذکور فی قلبی این سنه آیات هم فراگرفته و رایات غم مرتفع
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
